creator: ladyandhersweetescapes
caption:
DSF Final Sale is on @towncentrejumeirah! 

This shopping destination in Jumeirah has unique boutiques, home stores, and cafes! Here are the shops we visited:
* Little Luxuries: a cute home shop selling pretty accessories and shabby chic furniture
* Dwell: a furniture store for luxury and trendy home pieces 
* Josef Seibel: a shoe boutique offering comfortable European footwear
*  Al Jaber Optical: a trusted optical shop in the UAE. They have a wide selection of eyeglasses in classic and contemporary designs
* Ceramic Corner: an artsy cafe where you can paint and dine! 

💵 This DSF, you’ll get a chance to win AED 20,000 when you shop for AED 200 at Town Centre Jumeirah! Visit now! 

@celebratedubai @styledbydubai 
#mydsf #visitDubai #dubai #Jumeirah #TownCentreJumeirah #DubaiShoppingFestival
